definitions: An aromatic resin exuded from the bark of a Mediterranean tree, used in making varnish and chewing gum.
The Mediterranean tree (Pistacia lentiscus) that yields this resin.
A waterproof filler or adhesive used in building and masonry.
examples: The artist applied a coat of mastic varnish.
Seal the joints with a waterproof mastic.
Mastic resin is harvested on the island of Chios.
